evidence_summary: The production must emphasize the overwhelming scale of the ancient, sprawling city of Thark to facilitate a transition from awe to isolation. Visuals should focus on the massive architecture and the physical process of separating the protagonists into diff...

The group arrives at the massive city of Thark. Due to their status, they are separated; John Carter is assigned quarters in a large building near the central plaza, while Dejah Thoris remains under Thark supervision.
